business-model-canvas.en: Every value-chain activity translates into a Key Activity, Key Resource, or Key Partner on the BMC. Don't let Value Chain stay on a slide — map each activity into a BMC block.
business-model-canvas.zh: 每个价值链活动都对应 BMC 的某个关键活动、关键资源或关键伙伴。不要让 Value Chain 停在图上——把每个活动映射到 BMC 的某个块。

design-criteria-canvas.en: Encode activity-level rules (gross margin ≥30%, service response ≤4h, supplier defect rate ≤0.1%) as design criteria the next business-model iteration must respect.
design-criteria-canvas.zh: 把活动级规则（毛利 ≥30%、服务响应 ≤4h、供应商缺陷率 ≤0.1%）编码为下一轮商业模式迭代必须遵守的设计准则。

platform-ecosystem-map.en: For platform / multi-sided businesses, physical inbound and outbound logistics shrink to near-zero; Technology Development and capacity Procurement dominate. Use the ecosystem map alongside.
platform-ecosystem-map.zh: 对于平台 / 多边业务，实体的进货与出货物流几乎消失，技术开发与容量采购成为主导。配合生态地图一起看。

description.en: Activity where scale, automation, or process design creates a defendable cost gap vs. competitors.
description.zh: 通过规模、自动化或流程设计相对竞争对手建立可守护成本差的活动。

description.en: Activity where quality, design, or experience creates a price premium customers will pay for.
description.zh: 通过品质、设计或体验创造客户愿意付溢价的活动。

description.en: Reinforcing or conflicting handoff between two activities (e.g., procurement quality → operations consistency).
description.zh: 两个活动之间互相加强或互相打架的接缝（如采购品质 → 生产稳定性）。

description.en: Activity where cost is rising, differentiation is eroding, or capability is below the bar required by the strategic intent.
description.zh: 成本上涨、差异化失效，或能力低于战略意图所要求底线的活动。

description.en: Capability or asset the firm should invest in to deepen advantage at this activity.
description.zh: 为强化此活动优势需要追加投入的能力或资产。
